final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: mobile wallpaper, 9:16 portrait
Primary request: macro close-up of a water droplet reflecting the surrounding world, with grass blades and dew drops
Scene/backdrop: meadow grass with morning dew, circular bokeh background
Subject: single water droplet as the focal point, showing inverted reflection of sky and grass, surrounded by fresh green grass blades and smaller dew drops
Style/medium: macro photography, nature documentary style
Composition/framing: extreme close-up macro, shallow depth of field, droplet centered
Lighting/mood: soft diffused morning light, gentle and ethereal, magical atmosphere
Color palette: fresh greens, crystal clear water, soft blue sky reflections, warm golden bokeh circles
Materials/textures: transparent water droplet with surface tension, delicate grass blades with fine veins, soft circular bokeh
Constraints: keep the water droplet as the hero element with visible internal reflection, background must show circular bokeh
Avoid: harsh shadows, oversaturated colors, artificial elements, flat lighting
